gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/277)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/277)
text: إِنَّكُمْ تُلَقِّنُونَ مَوْتَاكُمْ عِنْدَ الْمَوْتِ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَ نَحْنُ نُلَقِّنُ مَوْتَانَا مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) .

en.hubeali: From him, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Abu Ayoub, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, and Hafs Bin Al-Bakhtary from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘You should be indoctrinating your dying ones during the death, ‘There is no god except for Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’, and we<sup>asws</sup> are indoctrinating our<sup>asws</sup> dying ones, ‘Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> is Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>’’.
en.sarwar: 2. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from abu Ayyub from Muhammad ibn Muslim from Abu Ja’far, and from Hafs ibn al-Bakhtariy who said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that you should dictate to your dying people, ‘Only Allah is the Lord to be worshipped.’ We, however, (in addition) dictate to our dying people, ‘Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah.’”
